pk_tuples.notes: Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg single dose in healthy subjects, fasted (Cohort 5 reference). GLSM Cmax 581.72 ng/mL, AUClast 5389.63 ng*h/mL, AUCinf 5469.11 h*ng/mL. Food effect study.

pk_tuples.dose_original: VEL 100 mg single dose with light breakfast
pk_tuples.notes: Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg single dose with light breakfast (Cohort 5). GLSM Cmax 784.7 ng/mL, AUClast 6728.66 ng*h/mL, AUCinf 6820.80 h*ng/mL. 25-35% increase over fasted.
Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg single dose in healthy subjects, fasted (Cohort 6 reference). GLSM Cmax 485.72 ng/mL, AUClast 3746.30 h*ng/mL, AUCinf 3786.61 h*ng/mL.

pk_tuples.dose_original: VEL 100 mg single dose with high-fat breakfast
pk_tuples.notes: Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg single dose with high-fat breakfast (Cohort 6). GLSM Cmax 364.3 ng/mL, AUClast 3222.57 h*ng/mL, AUCinf 3267.75 h*ng/mL. 14-25% decrease vs fasted.
Sofosbuvir (SOF) 400 mg once daily in healthy subjects (Population PK). Mean AUCtau 1272 ng*h/mL, Cmax 550 ng/mL, Tmax ~0.5 h, t1/2 ~0.5 h. Co-administered with VEL 100 mg as SOF/VEL (Epclusa).

Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg once daily in healthy subjects (Population PK). Mean AUCtau 4556 ng*h/mL, Cmax 421 ng/mL, Ctau 65 ng/mL, t1/2 ~15 h, Tmax ~3 h. Co-administered with SOF 400 mg as SOF/VEL (Epclusa).

pk_tuples.dose_original: SOF 400 mg once daily in HCV-infected subjects
pk_tuples.notes: Sofosbuvir (SOF) 400 mg once daily in HCV-infected subjects (Population PK Analysis). Mean AUCtau 1262 ng*h/mL, Cmax 566 ng/mL.

pk_tuples.dose_original: VEL 100 mg once daily in HCV-infected subjects
pk_tuples.notes: Velpatasvir (VEL) 100 mg once daily in HCV-infected subjects (Population PK). Mean AUCtau 2967 ng*h/mL, Cmax 259 ng/mL, Ctau 41 ng/mL. 37-41% lower than healthy.
